response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title 'Forever Young' from on-screen text. 2. Identified the performers as Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'Forever Young AK-69' since the original artists were credited on screen. 4. Split the video into scenes based on music and vocal presence, with the main vocal performance from 00:58 to 04:30. 5. Provided the full lyrics in Japanese.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting, followed by a musical performance of 'Forever Young' by VTubers Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine, and a concluding talk.

scenes.description: The performer Inugami Korone waves and gives an intro talk.
The band introduces the song with instrumental music before the vocals start.
VTubers Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine perform the song 'Forever Young' on stage with a band.
